evidence.quote: 12 sets of full factors drilling tests were arranged in the experiment, using three spindle speeds and four feed speeds (see Table 1)

issues.reason: Table 1 shows calibration feed speeds as 44, 60.5, 77, 93.5 etc. The values 70, 92, 144 appear in optimization/validation sections (Section 6), not the 12-set calibration experiment.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Update feed_speeds to match Table 1 values (e.g., 44, 60.5, 77, 93.5 for 550 rpm) or clarify these are optimization range limits.

evidence.quote: prediction error of tool wear rate K_VB is below 10%, with an average prediction error of 5.00%... initial tool wear b_VB is below 20%, with an average prediction error of 10.45%

issues.reason: Table 10 sets Population size to 200. 60 is the size of the resulting Pareto solution set, not the algorithm population size parameter.

evidence.quote: prediction errors of processing energy consumption for three different parameters are 5.86%, 1.57%, and 4.51%
increase the total drilling length by 40%

issues.claim: Optimized parameters increased total drilling length by 40% compared to non-optimal parameters (in Step 8 context)
issues.reason: The 40% improvement claim is from Section 6.1 (Single-objective Tool Life Validation), while Step 8 follows Step 7 (Multi-objective NSGA-II Validation, Section 6.3) which focuses on prediction error accuracy.
